ground_truth.title: Travel Insurance - The Travel Yogi
ground_truth.main_content: You're ready to set out and absorb some beauty on and off your mat. Now it's time to ensure that if a hurdle pops up before you depart, or a delay or issue arises while you're on the road, that you're covered. The unknown can easily arise and, as we strictly adhere to our cancelation policies, travel insurance is highly recommended, and on some adventures, required. You can insure yourself through our recommendation, or any reputable company, but please do be sure to get coverage. Redpoint insurance is available at various levels, depending on the specific aspects of your trip, and designed for adventurous travelers of all ages. Coverage includes overseas medical, evacuation, baggage and a range of adventure travel activities, and can cover travelers of all ages. FAQ: Does Travel Insurance work? YES. Our office staff has used their insurance to get full refunds when their kiddos have sprung a fever right before a business trip, when a nasty finger laceration happened demanded a trip cancellation and when a suitcase was lost en route to a yoga retreat adventure. Can I buy the insurance offered through the airline when I buy my plane ticket? You can but please remember that only covers your flight, not your trip. Travel insurance purchased here covers you from the date of coverage through to the day your trip ends. Do I need to buy insurance the same day I deposit my trip? You don't have to but it's highly recommended. The best coverage is offered if you purchase your policy within 14 days of booking your adventure. Why should I buy this travel insurance? These guys have your back with 24hr service on all policies: Evacuation & rescue services from your location to the hospital of your choice, high-end travel protection coverage such as primary medical expense coverage, trip cancellation/interruption and more. Should an issue arise on the road you can file a claim online while traveling with Redpoint. Peace.Of.Mind.
